attributes.visualDNA: Playfair Display headlines paired with Lora body text on a warm cream page (#fcf8f1). Generous paragraph spacing, italic subtitles, deep-rose pull-quote color, near-sharp corner radius. Classic literary-magazine print feel — slower, more considered, decorative.

cardInfo.name: Warm Editorial
cardInfo.summary: Playfair + Lora serifs · cream page · deep-rose accent — classic lit-mag print.
